experiment_title: Na2S与氧化剂反应及气体收集实验

data.xdl_enriched:
<XDL>
  <Metadata title="Na2S与氧化剂反应及气体收集实验" goal="探究Na2S与不同氧化剂反应生成的气体性质，并通过收集气体观察对品红溶液的褪色作用" difficulty="Normal" />
  <Synthesis>
    <Hardware>
      <Component id="test_tube_1" type="test_tube" capacity="10ml" />
      <Component id="test_tube_2" type="test_tube" capacity="10ml" />
      <Component id="test_tube_3" type="test_tube" capacity="10ml" />
      <Component id="test_tube_4" type="test_tube" capacity="10ml" />
      <Component id="dropper_1" type="dropper" />
      <Component id="dropper_2" type="dropper" />
      <Component id="glass_rod_1" type="glass_rod" />
      <Component id="rubber_stopper_with_tube" type="rubber_stopper_with_tube" />
      <Component id="alcohol_lamp_1" type="alcohol_lamp" />
      <Component id="stand_1" type="stand" />
    </Hardware>
    <Reagents>
      <Reagent name="Na2S_solution" state="liquid" />
      <Reagent name="H2SO3_solution" state="liquid" />
      <Reagent name="Acidic_KMnO4_solution" state="liquid" />
      <Reagent name="NaOH_solution" state="liquid" />
      <Reagent name="Concentrated_H2SO4" state="liquid" />
      <Reagent name="Copper_piece" state="solid" />
      <Reagent name="Fuchsin_solution" state="liquid" />
    </Reagents>
    <Procedure>
      <Add vessel="test_tube_1" reagent="Na2S" volume="1 mL" id="step_0" />
      <Add vessel="test_tube_2" reagent="Na2S" volume="1 mL" id="step_1" />
      <Add vessel="test_tube_4" reagent="H2SO4" volume="1 mL" id="step_2" />
      <Add vessel="test_tube_4" reagent="Cu" mass="0.5 g" id="step_3" />
      <Add vessel="test_tube_1" reagent="H2SO3" volume="0.5 mL" tool="dropper_1" id="step_4" />
      <Add vessel="test_tube_2" reagent="KMnO4" volume="0.5 mL" tool="dropper_2" id="step_5" />
      <Add vessel="test_tube_1" reagent="NaOH" volume="0.2 mL" id="step_6" />
      <Add vessel="test_tube_2" reagent="NaOH" volume="0.2 mL" id="step_7" />
      <Wait time="30s" id="step_8" />
      <Attach vessel="test_tube_4" support="stand_1" id="step_9" />
      <Insert tool="rubber_stopper_with_tube" vessel="test_tube_4" id="step_10" />
      <Insert tool="rubber_stopper_with_tube" vessel="test_tube_3" id="step_11" />
      <Heat vessel="test_tube_4" target_temperature="100" id="step_12" />
      <Wait time="60s" id="step_13" />
    </Procedure>
  </Synthesis>
</XDL>

graph_nodes.description: 分别在试管中加入Na2S溶液，并配制与氧化剂反应的混合液，为后续气体发生做准备。
组装气体发生装置：在试管中加入浓硫酸和铜片，固定试管于试管架，并插入带导管的橡皮塞，为加热和气体收集做准备。
加热气体发生装置，促使反应生成气体，并等待气体收集完成。
